breaks.description: HQLA reference data is stale, causing incorrect security classifications
breaks.root_cause: HQLA eligibility file not updated since last business day
breaks.recommended_action: Refresh HQLA reference data from DTCC feed

breaks.description: FX rate source mismatch between source and target data
breaks.root_cause: Source and target systems using different FX rate sources
breaks.recommended_action: Align FX rate sources between systems

breaks.description: Counterparty LEIs present in source but missing in target
breaks.root_cause: LEI sync between counterparty master and AxiomSL delayed
breaks.recommended_action: Trigger manual LEI sync and verify counterparty mappings
